title: IBM India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: IBM India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
IBM India has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IBM India:
IBM India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India!
